creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
Support for the Huawei E220 3G modem.

At http://www.mavetju.org/weblog/html/00192.html and at
http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=84233+0+current/freebsd-usb is
described that it works and how it works.

I don't know how to overcome the "wiggle the cable half out of the
socket" trick, but maybe that
http://mail-index.netbsd.org/current-users/2007/11/29/0000.html
will give people a hint.

I'm more than happy to try anything (well, not really anything).
